items.markdown:
Business process automation (BPA) is `the use of software and technology to digitize, streamline, and execute repeatable, rule-based business tasks without manual intervention` . Its primary goal is to improve operational efficiency, reduce human error, and free up employees for higher-level, strategic work.[](https://www.ibm.com/think/topics/business-process-automation) [[1]](https://www.ibm.com/think/topics/business-process-automation)[[2]](https://www.boc-group.com/en/blog/bpm/process-automation-your-path-to-operational-efficiency/)[[3]](https://kissflow.com/workflow/bpm/business-process-automation/)[[4]](https://www.microsoft.com/en/power-platform/products/power-automate/topics/business-process/business-process-automation-benefits)[[5]](https://www.turian.ai/blog/what-is-business-process-automation)[[6]](https://business.udemy.com/blog/business-process-automation/)

Common Examples

- **Employee Onboarding:** When HR enters a new hire, the system automatically triggers welcome emails, creates IT accounts, and sets up payroll.[](https://www.techtarget.com/searchcio/definition/business-process-automation) [[1]](https://www.techtarget.com/searchcio/definition/business-process-automation)[[2]](https://kissflow.com/workflow/bpm/business-process-automation/)
- **Invoice Processing:** Software reads incoming invoices, verifies the data against purchase orders, and routes them to managers for approval.[[1]](https://codewave.com/insights/guide-business-process-automation/)[[2]](https://autuskey.com/blogs/what-is-business-process-automation-2026)[[3]](https://www.blueprism.com/guides/business-process/operations/)[[4]](https://www.servicenow.com/platform/what-is-business-process-automation.html)
- **Inventory Management:** When stock falls below a set threshold, the system automatically generates and sends purchase orders to suppliers.[](https://www.ibm.com/think/topics/business-process-automation) [[1]](https://www.ibm.com/think/topics/business-process-automation)

Key Technologies Used

- **Robotic Process Automation (RPA):** Utilizes software "bots" to mimic human actions, such as copying and pasting data between legacy applications.[](https://kissflow.com/workflow/bpm/business-process-automation/) [[1]](https://kissflow.com/workflow/bpm/business-process-automation/)[[2]](https://www.salesforce.com/platform/business-process-automation/)
- **Workflow Automation:** Organizes the sequential flow of tasks, approvals, and document routing across multiple departments.[](https://kissflow.com/workflow/bpm/business-process-automation/) [[1]](https://kissflow.com/workflow/bpm/business-process-automation/)
- **Intelligent Process Automation (IPA):** Combines standard automation with Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Machine Learning to process unstructured data or make complex decisions.[](https://kissflow.com/workflow/bpm/business-process-automation/) [[1]](https://kissflow.com/workflow/bpm/business-process-automation/)

Core Benefits

- **Cost and Time Savings:** Eliminates labor-intensive paper processes and data entry tasks, directly reducing operational costs.
- **Standardization and Compliance:** Ensures that every task follows the exact same predefined rules, creating audit trails and enforcing compliance.
- **Reduced Errors:** Removes the risk of typos, missed steps, or lost documents associated with manual processing.[](https://www.microsoft.com/en/power-platform/products/power-automate/topics/business-process/business-process-automation-benefits) [[1]](https://www.microsoft.com/en/power-platform/products/power-automate/topics/business-process/business-process-automation-benefits)[[2]](https://www.salesforce.com/platform/business-process-automation/)[[3]](https://kissflow.com/workflow/bpm/business-process-automation/)

Top Enterprise Tools Leading platforms and tools for implementing BPA include:[](https://www.auxis.com/learn/rpa/top-rpa-tools/) [[1]](https://www.auxis.com/learn/rpa/top-rpa-tools/)

- **Microsoft Power Automate:** A low-code platform to streamline repetitive tasks across Microsoft 365 and other systems.
- **UiPath:** A market-leading, enterprise-grade Robotic Process Automation (RPA) tool.
- **[Salesforce](https://www.salesforce.com/platform/business-process-automation/):** Provides built-in workflow automation and data management tools for customer and sales operations.[](https://www.microsoft.com/en/power-platform/products/power-automate/topics/business-process/business-process-automation-benefits) [[1]](https://www.microsoft.com/en/power-platform/products/power-automate/topics/business-process/business-process-automation-benefits)[[2]](https://www.auxis.com/learn/rpa/top-rpa-tools/)[[3]](https://www.salesforce.com/platform/business-process-automation/)[[4]](https://www.impactory.de/en/business-process-automation/)[[5]](https://www.bulb.digital/blog/systemizing-your-processes-for-growth)
